case_title: DAN SOLLIDAY VS. EXPRESSWORKS INTERNATIONAL LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLLIDAY, DAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXPRESSWORKS INTERNATIONAL LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
